description_long: This is a modern commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined fuselage painted primarily white, featuring the 'flydubai' livery in blue and orange on both sides. The aircraft has two large turbofan engines mounted under its low, swept-back wings, which are equipped with upward-angled winglets at the tips. The tail section consists of a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, with the vertical fin adorned in a blue and orange gradient design. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible for pilot visibility. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear at the front. The overall design is typical of a narrow-body jetliner used for short to medium-haul flights.
description: A sleek, white commercial jet with 'flydubai' branding, twin underwing turbofan engines, swept low wings with winglets, and a blue-orange tail fin.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, twin engines, and the T-shaped tail with blue and orange winglets.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the 'flydubai' livery, cockpit windows, and the low-mounted swept wings with upward winglets.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin engines, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the symmetry of the tail section.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with clear visibility of the livery, engine placement, and the detailed tail fin design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with upward-angled winglets at the tips and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and one nose gear
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows
